name: Floor Lamp (Includes LED Light Bulb) Black - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description: Decorate your home in minimalist style by displaying this Floor Lamp from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. This floor lamp features a round base with an empire-shape shade supported by a thin rod for a modern look that works well with your existing decor. Designed with a socket pull chain for quick and easy lighting, this metal lamp has a one-way light setting for added convenience.
